activation_condition: StegVerse-Labs/repo-standards Git tag/release exists and release bundle source is known
blocked_by: repo-standards tag/release not visible to this connector session

pending_updates.action: replace pending upstream tag/release placeholders with final release tag, release URL, bundle source, validation report path, org-profile adoption path, and downstream sync issue
set status to UPSTREAM_TAG_RELEASE_REFERENCED and record release tag metadata
update upstream state from pending release to release referenced and record validation result

non_claims: Do not claim repo validation equals admissibility.
Do not claim repo-standards is execution authority.
Do not claim bundle installation grants governance standing.
